diff: The `CANCELLER_ROLE` on the OpenZeppelin `TimelockController` holding the `OWNER_ROLE` of a Tokenized Treasury Instance is authorized to cancel queued Timelock operations before execution. Across Tokenized Treasury Instances, this role is held by the Freezer Multisig at `0xB0113804960345fd0a245788b3423319c86940e5`.
